NODE_MARSHALL.bio: The Marshall. Order in a world of static. Seeking the physical killer.

NODE_SEER.bio: The Seer. Vessel for the 16Hz ripple. Interpreting omens of the glitch.

NODE_CAPT_MARSH.bio: Captain Obed Marsh. Salt-worn and timeline-displaced. Holder of the old maps.

NODE_HAMMER.bio: The Hammer. Specialist in structural integrity and mechanical restoration.

NODE_FARRIER.bio: The Farrier. Master of iron and the heat that reshapes reality.

NODE_ECHO.bio: The Echo. A lingering voice from a timeline that shouldn't exist.

NODE_SURGEON.bio: The Surgeon. Repairing the biological glitches in the population.

NODE_LIBRARIAN.bio: The Librarian. Keeper of the physical books before they turned to data.

NODE_SURVEYOR.bio: The Surveyor. Mapping the shifting borders of the Gulch.

NODE_GAMBLER.bio: The Gambler. Betting against the house in a rigged reality.

NODE_TELEGRAPHIST.bio: The Telegraphist. Intercepting the 16Hz signals from the void.

NODE_OUTLAW.bio: The Outlaw. Living in the static between the law and the glitch.

NODE_DRIFTER.bio: The Drifter. Wandering through multiple versions of the town.

NODE_PROPRIETOR.bio: The Proprietor. Resource custodian and keeper of the central hub.

NODE_RESIDENT.bio: The Resident. Guardian of the Restored Chronicle. The final node.

motives: Identify the first anomaly at the Gulch.
Find the harmony in the static.
